description: A severe storm is approaching the Solent. You must plan the anchorage positions for 6 large vessels seeking shelter in the 'St Helens' deep-water anchorage. Using the ship data and safety formulas in '/home/ga/Documents/anchorage_request.txt' and the boundary coordinates in '/home/ga/Documents/anchorage_zone.txt', calculate valid positions for all 6 vessels. Ensure all vessels are strictly within the specified zone and that no two vessels have overlapping swing circles (the distance between them must be greater than the sum of their calculated swing radii). Create a Bridge Command scenario at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) St Helens Storm Anchorage/' including an 'othership.ini' file with the 6 vessels at your calculated coordinates (Speed=0) and an 'environment.ini' file configured for 'Weather=5.0' and 'Setting=Solent'.
